violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety with RIDOH. Application provided. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2026
Potatoes were observed stored on the floor in the kitchen. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2026
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of bio-film. Ice machine to be cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 02/02/2026
